verses.text: Tua ciangin David in, “Jonathan' hangin ama tungah migitna ka lahtheihna dingin Saul' innkuan sungah mi khatpeuh a omlai hiam?” a ci hi
Saul' innkuan sungah Ziba min nei nasempa khat om a, amaute in David kiangah amah sam uh hi. Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Ziba na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Na nasempa kei pen Ziba ka hi hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Pasian' tungah ka ciamsa bangin migitna ka lahtheihna ding Saul' innkuan-ah mi khat beek omlai lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Ziba in kumpipa kiangah, “Jonathan' tapa khat omlai hi; amah a khe zaw hi,” a ci hi
Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Amah koi-ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Ziba in kumpipa kiangah, “Lodebar-a Ammiel' tapa Makhir' inn-ah amah om hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Kumpi David in mi sawlin Lodebar-a Ammiel' tapa Makhir' inn panin amah a lasak hi
Tua ciangin Saul' tapa Jonathan, a ta Mefibosheth David kiangah hong pai a, maipukin zahtakna a bawl hi. Tua ciangin David in, “Mefibosheth!” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “En in, na nasempa,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin David in ama kiangah, “Lau kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh na pa Jonathan' hangin nangma tungah migitna kong lak ding a, na pu Saul' leitang khempeuh nangma tungah kong piakik ding hi. Tua ciangin nangmah in ka sabuai-ah an na ne tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in zahtakna bawlin, “A sisa ui tawh a kibang kei bang lel, nong hici bawlna dingin na nasempa bang ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in Saul' nasempa Ziba samin ama kiangah, “Saul leh a innkuan tawh a kizom khempeuh na topa' tupa' tungah ka pia khin hi

Nang leh na tapate leh na nasemte in ama-a' dingin lo na kho ding uh a, na topa' tupa in annek ding a neihtheihna dingin a piangte na tun'pih ding uh hi. Ahih hangin na topa' tupa Mefibosheth in keima sabuai-ah an ne tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi. Ziba in tapa sawmlenga leh nasem sawmnih nei hi

Tua ciangin Ziba in kumpipa kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa in nong thupiak khempeuh tawh kizui-in na nasempa in hih ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa' tapate khat bangin Mefibosheth in David' sabuai-ah an a ne hi
Mefibosheth in Mika min nei tapa tangval khat nei hi. Ziba' inn-ah a teng khempeuh Mefibosheth' nasemte a suak hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem-ah Mefibosheth teng a, amah in kumpipa' sabuai-ah an ne tawntung hi. Mifibosheth a khe a langnihin a zaw hi.
